title: Test: Equal Splits
content: Equal 50/50 equity splits work best when both cofounders contribute equally in time, skills, capital, and risk. Should always be paired with vesting.

title: Test: Standard Vesting
content: The industry standard vesting schedule is 4 years with a 1-year cliff. No equity vests for the first 12 months. After the cliff, 25% vests immediately, remaining vests monthly.

title: Test: IP Assignment
content: All cofounders should assign their intellectual property to the company. Without IP assignment, each cofounder technically owns whatever they personally created.
